profile.title: Professional Profile
paragraphs: I am a Front-End Developer specialized in React, TypeScript, and Next.js, with over four years of experience building modern, scalable, and high-performance web applications. I currently work on projects focused on telecommunications and digital communication solutions, developing software that supports major companies in their technological transformation initiatives and digital product evolution.

My work is centered on building robust, accessible, and user-focused interfaces in complex environments, collaborating closely with multidisciplinary teams to deliver solutions aligned with business needs and strategic objectives.

At CPQD, one of Latin America's leading innovation centers in Information and Communication Technologies (ICT), I contribute to the development of platforms and technological solutions for telecommunications companies and other strategic industries. My responsibilities include front-end architecture implementation, code quality improvements, technical best practices, and the continuous evolution of digital products.

My key strength lies in combining technical excellence, product thinking, and collaboration. I am committed to building sustainable, scalable, and high-performing solutions while maintaining a strong focus on user experience, delivery quality, and business value.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: In this section, I present both professional and personal projects developed as a Front-end Developer and Tech Lead in real production environments. All projects were built with a strong focus on performance, SEO, accessibility, and user experience.

project_professional.sofa_description: E-commerce platform specialized in compressed sofas delivered in boxes, focused on convenience, design, and seamless delivery experience.
project_professional.eco_description: High-end outdoor furniture e-commerce platform, prioritizing sophistication, durability, and premium presentation.
project_professional.ld_description: Online store designed for the children's market, focused on delivering a welcoming, intuitive, and safe shopping experience.
project_professional.be_description: Minimalist sofas and armchairs e-commerce platform, centered on clean design and a premium user experience.

project_personal.fit_description: Fit Feed is an application that allows users to share workout routines, diets, and health-related content in an interactive way.
project_personal.food_description: Food Recipe is an application designed to explore a wide collection of recipes, providing a practical and inspiring cooking experience.
project_personal.social_description: Social Pets is a platform where pet owners can share photos and interact with other pet lovers.
project_personal.john_description: A web-based task management application designed to help users organize their routines and efficiently manage daily activities.

career.title: Professional Career
career.description: Explore my professional journey and discover how I developed expertise in web development, technical decisions, and software architecture over the years.

frontend_developer_cpqd.title: Front-end Developer
frontend_developer_cpqd.description: Development of web applications for telecommunications and digital communication projects. Responsible for implementing modern user interfaces, integrating APIs, and building B2B solutions focused on research, innovation, and digital transformation. Collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to evolve platforms, apply development best practices, and deliver products aligned with customer needs.

frontend_developer_ecommerce.title: Front-end Developer & Software Analyst
frontend_developer_ecommerce.description: Responsible for the development and continuous improvement of the company's e-commerce platform, delivering enhancements in user experience, interface design, and performance. Worked on technical SEO strategies, Core Web Vitals optimization, A/B testing initiatives, and ERP-Shopify integrations. Contributed to development standards, code reviews, and agile processes, supporting business growth and operational efficiency.

intern.title: Web Software Development Intern
intern.description: Developed web interfaces for academic portals and journal platforms using Vue.js, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and PHP. Participated in feature implementation, automated testing, and continuous integration processes, contributing to platforms used by educational and research institutions in Brazil and abroad.

articles.title: Articles
articles.description: Access my scientific research papers and final graduation project, focused on technology and software development research.

social_network.title: Social Media
social_network.description: Follow my work on social media and stay updated on development, technology, and ongoing projects.
